change_summary: Structure height increased 40% downward to accommodate a larger battery pack

cascade_issues.title: Thermal Gradient Exceeds Limit
cascade_issues.description: Increasing the structure height by 40% downward will likely increase thermal gradients across the optical bench, potentially exceeding the ΔT ≤ 15°C requirement.

cascade_issues.title: Shock Test Required for New Geometry
cascade_issues.description: The change in structure geometry necessitates a new shock test to ensure compliance with the launcher SRS ICD.

cascade_issues.title: Volume Envelope Exceeded
cascade_issues.description: The increase in structure height may cause the payload volume to exceed the platform accommodation envelope of 0.10 m³.

missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
missing_tests.reason: The change in structure geometry requires revalidation of shock response.
